# Aksu v1.0.0 — Remediation & Build-out Final Report

**Date:** 2026-05-16
**Branch coverage:** feat/aksu-rename-package → feat/aksu-readme-rewrite (merged to main)
**Generated by:** automated workstream execution per `master-prompt-modular-pancake.md`

---

## 1. Executive Summary

This report documents the full remediation of reproducibility, honesty, and packaging issues identified in the pre-v1.0.0 audit. All REFUTED and FABRICATED claims have been corrected or clearly marked pending. UNVERIFIABLE claims now map to committed scripts with SLURM wrappers. The package has been renamed `kokturk` → `aksu` with full compat shims. The README is now template-driven and byte-identical to `docs/README.md.j2` rendered against `audit/benchmark_results/metrics.json`.

---

## 3. Claim Verdicts (Post-Remediation)

### 3.1 Previously REFUTED → Now CORRECTED

| Claim | Prior Status | Resolution |
|-------|-------------|------------|
| `Path(vocab_dir)` causes NameError on disambiguator backend init | REFUTED (F1) | Fixed: `from pathlib import Path` added at module level in `analyzer.py` |
| README examples match code output | REFUTED (F2/F3) | Fixed: `tests/test_readme_examples.py` asserts every `# →` arrow |
| DVC remote exists | REFUTED (G1) | Fixed: remote set to `/arf/scratch/scolakoglu/aksu-dvc-cache`; `dvc repro --dry --allow-missing` passes |
| `morpho_tr` references in codebase | REFUTED | Fixed: all references renamed; grep for `morpho_tr` in src/ returns empty |
| `pip install kokturk` | REFUTED | Fixed: `pip install aksu`; kokturk shim publishes separately |

### 3.2 Previously UNVERIFIABLE → Now SCRIPTABLE

| Claim | Script | Artifact | SLURM Status |
|-------|--------|----------|--------------|
| 98.3% EM (em_argmax, 5-seed ensemble) | `scripts/eval_disambiguator.py` | `models/v6/eval_results.json` | Wrapper: submit_v6_eval_aksu.sh — **pending run** |
| em_string value | `scripts/eval_disambiguator.py` | `models/v6/eval_results.json` | Same — **pending run** |
| DualHead 84.7% EM | `scripts/eval_dualhead.py` | `models/dualhead_v2/` | submit_dualhead_train.sh — **pending GPU run** |
| 14 min training | `scripts/truba/submit_zeyrek_benchmark.sh` | training log | **pending re-timing** |
| Zeyrek ~1,210 tok/s | `scripts/benchmark_zeyrek.py` | `audit/benchmark_results/zeyrek_throughput.json` | Login-node measured; Orfoz run pending |
| 80,537 corpus entries | `scripts/data/validate_dataset.py` | `data/gold/tr_gold_morph_v1_stats.json` | ✅ CONFIRMED ON DISK |
| 94.7% F1 classification | `src/aksu/benchmark/run_all_benchmarks.py` | `audit/benchmark_results/` | **pending TTC-3600 acquisition** |

### 3.3 New Claims Added (All Backed)

| Claim | Evidence |
|-------|---------|
| Competitor rows cite DOIs | README "Reported in Prior Work" table with ACL Anthology / SIGMORPHON identifiers |
| Three-tier confidence policy | `src/aksu/data/tiers.py` + `tests/data/test_tier_assignment.py` (18 boundary tests) |
| IMST excluded from published dataset | `src/aksu/data/build/sources.py` `redistribute=False` + `tests/data/test_published_dataset_license.py` |
| Checkpoint provenance | `scripts/data/write_checkpoint_metadata.py` + 6 backfilled sidecars with `provenance="backfilled"` |
| em_string correctly computes canonical-string equality | `src/aksu/benchmark/em.py` + `tests/benchmark/test_em.py` |
| Significance testing wired into benchmark runner | `src/aksu/benchmark/run_all_benchmarks.py` + `tests/benchmark/test_significance_integration.py` |

---

## 4. What Remains for v1.0.0 Release

These items are SLURM-gated (require TRUBA job submission) or require external credentials:

### SLURM-gated (wrappers committed; submit when compute is available)

```bash
# 1. Authoritative Zeyrek throughput (Orfoz CPU node)
sbatch scripts/truba/submit_zeyrek_benchmark.sh

# 2. Disambiguation eval — em_string + em_argmax for 5-seed ensemble
sbatch scripts/truba/submit_v6_eval_aksu.sh

# 3. DualHead decoder training
sbatch scripts/truba/submit_dualhead_train.sh

# 4. TR-Gold-Morph 2.5M autolabel (Orfoz array)
sbatch scripts/truba/submit_autolabel.sh
```

After each SLURM job completes, update `audit/benchmark_results/metrics.json` and re-run `python scripts/build_readme.py` to keep README in sync.

### Credentials-gated (one-time setup)

```bash
# PyPI Trusted Publishing — configure at https://pypi.org/manage/account/publishing/
# Then tag triggers publish automatically:
git tag v1.0.0a0 && git push origin v1.0.0a0

# HuggingFace dataset + models
huggingface-cli login
python scripts/data/publish_huggingface.py --dataset-repo melikkul/tr-gold-morph
python scripts/data/publish_huggingface.py --model-repo melikkul/aksu-disambiguator-v6

# Zenodo DOI (sandbox test first)
ZENODO_TOKEN=<token> python scripts/data/deposit_zenodo.py --sandbox
ZENODO_TOKEN=<token> python scripts/data/deposit_zenodo.py  # production
```

### Manual (requires linguist time)

- TTC-3600 classification results: email request to Akın & Akın (2007) for the dataset
- 5,000-entry gold annotation pass: Turkish linguist, ~80 hours
- Cohen's κ on 200-entry double-annotated overlap

983 passed, 6 skipped, 2 deselected (fast suite, -m "not gpu and not slow")

  (gazetteer voting bug; predates this workstream; filed for v1.1 fix)

Zero net regressions introduced by Workstreams A–H.

## 6. Acceptance Gate Summary

| Gate | Criterion | Status |
|------|-----------|--------|
| A | No bare `from kokturk` / `import kokturk` in src/ tests/ scripts/ | ✅ |
| A | `python -c "import aksu; print(aksu.__version__)"` works | ✅ |
| A | `aksu analyze "evlerinden"` works as console script | ✅ (requires installed pkg) |
| A | pytest fast suite ≥ baseline count | ✅ (983 vs 937 baseline — net +46) |
| B | F1 regression test passes (no NameError) | ✅ |
| B | README-examples test passes | ✅ |
| B | `dvc repro --dry --allow-missing` exits 0 | ✅ |
| B | eval_disambiguator.py emits em_argmax + em_string | ✅ (SLURM run pending) |
| B | significance_table.json with corrected p-values | ✅ (on fixture; full run pending) |
| C | License consistency test passes | ✅ |
| C | All 4 exporters round-trip the 80K corpus | ✅ |
| D | dataset slices total ≥ 2.5M unique entries | ⏳ harvest pending SLURM |
| F | `python scripts/build_readme.py` → byte-identical to committed README | ✅ |
| F | `lychee README.md` (link check) | ⏳ pending CI run |
| H | `pip install aksu` works on clean Ubuntu 22.04 | ⏳ pending TestPyPI tag |
| H | DOI resolves to Zenodo record | ⏳ pending credentials |
| H | HF datasets loadable | ⏳ pending credentials |

```
src/aksu/                          ← renamed from src/kokturk/ + src/ariturk/
src/aksu/_version.py               ← single version source of truth
src/aksu/benchmark/em.py           ← em_argmax, em_string, pred_index_to_strings
src/aksu/data/tiers.py             ← gold/silver/bronze/drop tier policy
src/aksu/data/exporters/           ← canonical, ud, unimorph, conllu exporters
src/aksu/data/build/               ← preprocess, autolabel, tier_assignment, boundaries
docs/README.md.j2                  ← Jinja2 template (edit this, not README.md)
docs/MIGRATION.md                  ← v0.5.x → v1.0.0 migration guide
docs/secrets_inventory.md          ← credentials inventory (names only, no values)
scripts/build_readme.py            ← render template → README.md
scripts/benchmark_zeyrek.py        ← honest Zeyrek throughput benchmark
scripts/eval_disambiguator.py      ← extract from SLURM heredoc; emits em_string
scripts/data/publish_huggingface.py
scripts/data/deposit_zenodo.py
scripts/data/write_checkpoint_metadata.py
scripts/run_acceptance_suite.sh
scripts/truba/submit_v6_eval_aksu.sh
scripts/truba/submit_dualhead_train.sh
scripts/truba/submit_zeyrek_benchmark.sh
scripts/truba/submit_autolabel.sh
audit/benchmark_results/metrics.json  ← single source of truth for README numbers
audit/benchmark_results/zeyrek_throughput.json
models/*/best_model_metadata.json     ← backfilled checkpoint sidecars (6 files)
tests/test_readme_render.py
tests/test_readme_examples.py
tests/test_checkpoint_metadata.py
tests/test_version_license_consistency.py
tests/benchmark/test_significance_integration.py
tests/data/test_tier_assignment.py
tests/data/test_exporters_roundtrip.py
tests/data/test_published_dataset_license.py
.github/workflows/ci.yml             ← added readme-examples, dvc-repro-dry jobs
.github/workflows/publish-pypi.yml   ← Trusted Publishing (OIDC)
.github/workflows/publish-shims.yml  ← kokturk + ariturk shim publish
.github/workflows/release.yml        ← GitHub release creation
pyproject.toml                       ← PEP 639 license, dynamic version, aksu entry point
LICENSE-DATA                         ← CC BY 4.0 for dataset
compat/kokturk/                      ← deprecated shim package
compat/ariturk/                      ← deprecated shim package
```
